reason: This is a general philosophical statement about being hurt by those close to you. It translates to 'When a distant person wrongs you, you may endure it, but when injustice comes from someone close or someone you love, it will be harder on the soul! Beware of wronging those close to you.' Contains no ISIS-related content or support.
original_post: عندما يظلمك شخص بعيد قد تتحمل ، ولكن عنما يأتيك الظلم من شخص قريب أو شخص تحبه فسوف يكون أشد على النفس ! فاحذر أن تظلم القريبين منك.
